chief_complaint: A 46-year-old female presenting with persistent cognitive, affective, and physical symptoms after SARS-CoV-2 infection.
history: The patient has a history of post-COVID-19 condition (PCC) with persistent cognitive, affective, and physical symptoms. She completed a 6-week immersive virtual reality (VR)-based cognitive intervention.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings not provided.
labs: Neuropsychological and psychological assessments occurred at baseline, after VR intervention (2-month follow-up), and at 5-month follow-up.
